function display_trial_summary(summary_data) {
    say "📊 TRIAL SUMMARY DASHBOARD"
    say "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"

    say "✅ Successful Trials: " + summary_data.successful_trials
    say "❌ Failed Trials: " + summary_data.failed_trials
    say "📊 Average Success Rate: " + (summary_data.average_success_rate * 100).toFixed(1) + "%"
    
    if summary_data.recent_trials.length > 0 {
      say ""
      say "🕒 Recent Trials:"
      for (let trial of summary_data.recent_trials.slice(-5)) {
        let status = trial.success ? "✅" : "❌"
        say "  " + status + " " + trial.behavior + " (" + (trial.performance * 100).toFixed(1) + "%)"
      }

function loss_cosine_distance(y, t) {
      set n = max(1, y.length)
      set dot = 0.0
      set ny = 0.0
      set nt = 0.0
      set i = 0
      while i < n {
        set vy = y[i]
        set vt = (t[i] or 0.0)
        set dot = dot + (vy * vt)
        set ny = ny + (vy * vy)
        set nt = nt + (vt * vt)
        set i = i + 1
      }

function cosine_similarity(a, b) {
    set ::num = 0.0
    set ::da = 0.0
    set ::db = 0.0
    set ::n = min(a.length, b.length)
    set ::i = 0
    
    while ::i < ::n {
      set ::num = ::num + (a[::i] * b[::i])
      set ::da = ::da + (a[::i] * a[::i])
      set ::db = ::db + (b[::i] * b[::i])
      set ::i = ::i + 1
    }

function convert_to_p_adic(data) {
    set ::prime = ::p_adic_compression.prime_base
    set ::precision = ::p_adic_compression.precision
    
    # Simplified p-adic conversion
    set ::value = abs(::data)
    set ::digits = []
    set ::digit_count = 0
    
    while ::value > 0 and ::digit_count < ::precision {
      set ::remainder = ::value % ::prime
              store ::digits from ::digits + [::remainder]
      set ::value = floor(::value / ::prime)
      set ::digit_count = ::digit_count + 1
    }

    set ::points = []
    
    if ::attractor_type == "lorenz" {
      set ::x = 0.1
      set ::y = 0.1
      set ::z = 0.1
      
      loop for ::i = 0; ::i < ::num_points; ::i++ {
        set ::dx = ::params.sigma * (::y - ::x)
        set ::dy = ::x * (::params.rho - ::z) - ::y
        set ::dz = ::x * ::y - ::params.beta * ::z
        
        set ::x = ::x + ::dx * ::dt
        set ::y = ::y + ::dy * ::dt
        set ::z = ::z + ::dz * ::dt
        
        set ::points[::i] = [::x, ::y, ::z]
      }
